top_blockers.finding: permit_all_parameters = true globally disables Strong Parameters, allowing mass-assignment attacks on every controller action
top_blockers.remediation: Remove config/initializers/permit_all_parameters.rb and add explicit strong parameter permits to every controller

top_blockers.finding: SQL injection via string interpolation in BoardDownstreamButtonSet.reconcile (line 690)
No CI/CD pipeline -- code auto-deploys to production without tests or security scans
top_blockers.remediation: Implement GitHub Actions with rspec, ember test, bundle audit, npm audit gates

top_blockers.finding: Rack 2.2.21 has CVE-2026-22860 (directory traversal, CVSS 7.5) and CVE-2026-25500 (stored XSS)
Access tokens stored/logged in API call logs, console.log, DEBUG-level Rails logs, and application_controller
top_blockers.remediation: Hash tokens before storage, remove console.log of tokens, set log level to INFO in production

top_blockers.finding: IP addresses and User-Agent stored indefinitely in device settings and LogSession with no retention policy
top_blockers.remediation: Implement IP anonymization at collection time and add scheduled data purge jobs

top_blockers.finding: Database IP allow list permits all IPs (0.0.0.0/0)
top_blockers.remediation: Restrict to Render internal network IPs

top_blockers.finding: No Content Security Policy headers configured
75 sendAction() calls block Ember 4.0 upgrade (removed in 4.0)
top_blockers.remediation: Replace all sendAction with closure actions

cross_cutting_themes.description: Access tokens appear in API logs, console output, Rails debug logs, and controller logs. Combined with permit_all_parameters, leaked tokens grant unrestricted write access.
No Strong Parameters, no CSP, no password complexity, no session timeout, database open to all IPs, no CI/CD security gates.
Rack has active CVEs, lodash has prototype pollution, Ember 3.28 is EOL, multiple gems abandoned.
IPs, user agents, geolocation, emails, tokens stored indefinitely with no retention policies, no purges, incomplete consent.
Ember is entirely legacy-pattern (484 classic files), 33 models skip ApplicationRecord, schema out of sync.
Code deploys without tests, linting, or security scanning. Low frontend test coverage. No documented rollback.

immediate: Remove permit_all_parameters and add explicit strong params to controllers
Scrub access tokens from all log outputs
Restrict database IP allow list to Render internal network
this_week: Add session timeout and password complexity requirements
Implement data retention policies for LogSession, devices, PaperTrail
this_sprint: Migrate 33 models to ApplicationRecord, 3 mailers to ApplicationMailer
Fix Utterance timestamp API contract mismatch
Document and test database backup/restore procedure
Remove abandoned gems (coffee-rails, rails_12factor, s3, rack-offline)
Fix schema file sync and migration version
this_quarter: Begin incremental Ember modernization (native classes, @tracked, angle-bracket)
Remove jQuery dependency from 56 frontend files
